---
id: update-ai-settings
title: "Update AI settings"
description: "Update AI provider configuration (admin only). This triggers hot-reload of AI services."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update AI settings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/settings/ai"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update AI provider configuration (admin only). This triggers hot-reload of AI services.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"embedding":{"properties":{"api_key":{"type":"string"},"base_url":{"type":"string"},"model":{"type":"string"},"provider":{"enum":["openai","anthropic","ollama","cohere","voyage"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["AIProviderOpenAI","AIProviderAnthropic","AIProviderOllama","AIProviderCohere","AIProviderVoyage"]}},"type":"object"},"llm":{"properties":{"api_key":{"type":"string"},"base_url":{"type":"string"},"model":{"type":"string"},"provider":{"enum":["openai","anthropic","ollama","cohere","voyage"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["AIProviderOpenAI","AIProviderAnthropic","AIProviderOllama","AIProviderCohere","AIProviderVoyage"]}},"type":"object"}},"type":"object"}}},"description":"AI settings to update","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
